snippet.title: Israel aprueba propuesta egipcia para alto el fuego con Ham├Īs

About Anne-Marie:
Anne-Marie has proved to be one of the UKŌĆÖs most exciting and successful British breakthrough pop stars of recent years. A former 3x world karate champion and West End child star-turned 9x BRIT Award nominee, A-MŌĆÖs rise has been nothing short of meteoric. In 2018 Anne-Marie released her debut album, ŌĆśSpeak Your MindŌĆÖ which featured the hit singles 'Alarm', 'Ciao Adios', 'Heavy', 'Friends', '2002' and 'Perfect to Me'. She subsequently ended that year as the UKŌĆÖs biggest-selling debut artist, selling out headline shows and playing stadium dates supporting long-time friend and champion Ed Sheeran in the process.

She has also sang on and co-written many other hits such as Birthday, Rockabye, Don't Leave Me Alone,  To Be Young, f*ck, i'm lonely and Don't Play, collaborating with the likes of Clean Bandit, Marshmello, David Guetta, Lauv, Rudimental, Doja Cat and KSI, as well as starring on The Greatest Showman: Reimagined soundtrack performing Rewrite the stars alongside James Arthur.

snippet.description:
Su nombre significa Movimiento de Resistencia Isl├Īmica y su origen se remonta a los primeros d├Łas de la Intifada palestina de 1987 en contra de la ocupaci├│n israel├Ł de Cisjordania y la Franja de Gaza.

Estados Unidos, la Uni├│n Europea, Jap├│n e Israel lo consideran una organizaci├│n terrorista pues sus militantes han estado detr├Īs de varios atentados en Israel. 

Hoy es el grupo isl├Īmico m├Īs numeroso dentro del pueblo palestino y desde el 2007 tom├│ el control de Gaza.

En este video te explicamos m├Īs de este grupo islamista que ha jugado un rol clave en el conflicto israel├Ł palestino.

snippet.title: Friends: The Reunion | Official Trailer | HBO Max
snippet.description:

Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry, David Schwimmer, and special guests reunite to discuss everything from their casting process to whether or not Ross and Rachel were really on a break. Witness the unbreakable bond of the group that perfectly captured the moment in life when your friends become your family.

snippet.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
snippet.description:
Download NOW!! Ō¢║Ō¢║ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! Ō¢║Ō¢║ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donŌĆÖt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamŌĆÖs safe and try to crack open your opponentsŌĆÖ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youŌĆÖre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

Features:
- Team up for real-time 3v3 battles against players from across the world
- A fast-paced multiplayer battle royale mode made for mobile
- Unlock and collect new, powerful Brawlers - each with a signature attack and Super ability
- New events and game modes daily
- Battle solo or with friends
- Climb to the top of the leaderboards in global and local rankings 
- Join or start your own Club with fellow players to share tips and battle together
- Customize Brawlers with unlockable skins
- Player-designed maps offer challenging new terrain to master

From the makers of Clash of Clans, Clash Royale and Boom Beach!

Support:
Contact us in-game via Settings, Help and Support ŌĆö or visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/brawl-stars/

Privacy Policy:
http://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

http://supercell.com/en/parents/

en.title: Brawl Stars: Meet Squeak! - Brawler Spotlight
en.description:
Download NOW!! Ō¢║Ō¢║ https://supr.cl/playbrawl
Be a BRAWLER! Subscribe! Ō¢║Ō¢║ https://supr.cl/subscribe

Fast-paced 3v3 multiplayer and battle royale made for mobile! Play with friends or solo across a variety of game modes in under three minutes.

Unlock and upgrade dozens of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Collect unique skins to stand out and show off. Battle in a variety of mysterious locations within the Brawliverse!

BATTLE IN MULTIPLE GAME MODES
- Gem Grab (3v3): Team up and out-strategize the opposing team. Collect and hold 10 gems to win, but get fragged and lose your gems.
- Showdown (Solo/Duo): A battle royale style fight for survival. Collect power ups for your Brawler. Grab a friend or play solo - be the last Brawler standing in the rowdiest battle royale yet. Winner take all!
- Brawl Ball (3v3): It's a whole new Brawl game! Show off your soccer/football skills and score two goals before the other team. There are no red cards here.
- Bounty (3v3): Take out opponents to earn stars, but donŌĆÖt let them pick you off. The squad with the most stars wins the match!
- Heist (3v3): Protect your teamŌĆÖs safe and try to crack open your opponentsŌĆÖ. Navigate the map to sneak, blast and blow your way clear to the enemies treasure.
- Special Events: Limited time special PvE and PvP game modes.
- Championship Challenge: Join Brawl Stars' esports scene with in-game qualifiers!

UNLOCK AND UPGRADE BRAWLERS
Collect and upgrade a variety of Brawlers with powerful Super abilities, Star Powers and Gadgets! Level them up and collect unique skins.

BRAWL PASS
Complete quests, open Brawl Boxes, earn Gems, pins and an exclusive Brawl Pass skin! Fresh content every season.

BECOME THE STAR PLAYER
Climb the local and regional leaderboards to prove youŌĆÖre the greatest Brawler of them all!

CONSTANTLY EVOLVING
Look out for new Brawlers, skins, maps, special events and games modes in the future.

PLEASE NOTE! Brawl Stars is free to download and play, however, some game items can also be purchased for real money. If you don't want to use this feature, please disable in-app purchases in your device's settings. Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 9 years of age to play or download Brawl Stars.

snippet.description:
Emilia & Boza ŌĆō Perreito Salvaje (Official Video)

M├║sica:

Deezer: https://emilia.lnk.to/PerreitoSalvaje/deezer

Letra:

Ey, ey
Emilia
Big One

Cuando bailamo' yo s├® que te recalienta'
Porque tu cuerpo y el m├Ło se complementan
El club cerrado, pero yo te abr├Ł la puerta
Que vamo' a darle, yeah

Un perre├Łto salvaje (Tra, tra)
Me encanta que le demos hasta abajo porque pa' eso te traje (Tra, tra, tra)
Y yo que ando bien suelta, baby, no respondo mensaje'
Bailamo' un ratito y despu├®' si t├║ quiere', te doy el puntająĄ (Baby)
Yeah-yeah (Tra, tra, tra)
Un perrąĄ├Łto salvaje

M├Ī' t├║ te suelta', m├Ī' suelto' t├║ y yo, beb├®
T├║ no puede' darme puntaje porque ya yo 'toy de die'
Te texte├® y me dijiste: "Papi, hoy te quiero ve'"
Yo no voy a digerirte, pero s├Ł quiero comerte-te
Un perreo bien savage

T├║ ere' maravilla como si yo fuera La Marash
Aqu├Ł no hace falta cash
Ando flow Gianluca Vacc, Vacc, Vacc
Con mi juguete y mi Phillie fumando hash (Hash)

T├║ ere' adicto
A la forma que tengo de besarte
Cuando no estoy contigo t├║ te come' la cabeza
Y empieza' a necesitarme (Shiu, shiu)

Un perre├Łto salvaje (Wuh; un perre├Łto, un perre├Łto; tra, tra)
Me encanta que le demos hasta abajo porque pa' eso te traje (Tra, tra, tra; un perre├Łto, un perre├Łto)
Y yo que ando bien suelta, baby, no respondo mensaje'
Bailamo' un ratito y despu├®' si t├║ quiere', te doy el puntaje (Baby)
Yeah-yeah (Tra, tra, tra)
Un perre├Łto salvaje
 
Hasta abajo como Don
Lo que no' iguala e' que no' gusta el reggaet├│n, yeah-yeah
Del party es la sensaci├│n
No, no soy pirata, pero manejo el tim├│n

Cuando te lo muevo s├® que est├Ī' tocando el cielo
Baj├Īndola lento, t├║ y yo rompiendo el suelo
Yo tir├® la ca├▒a y t├║ mordiste el anzuelo
Cuando te lo toco, papi, te desespero

T├║ tiene' piquete, pero tambi├®n
No voy a negarte que te ve' re bien
Un buen perreo nos respalda
Mi jean y tu falda en

Un perre├Łto salvaje (Un perre├Łto, un perre├Łto; tra, tra)
Te gusta cuando bajo porque noto que te subes el traje (Tra, tra, tra; un perre├Łto, un perre├Łto)
Y yo que ando bien suelta, baby, no respondo mensaje'
Bailamo' un ratito y despu├®' si t├║ quiere', te doy el puntaje (Baby)
Yeah-yeah (Tra, tra, tra)
Un perre├Łto salvaje

Un perre├Łto (Perre├Łto, yeah-yeah), un perre├Łto
Te gusta cuando bajo porque noto que te subes el traje
(Perre├Łto, perre├Łto, eh-eh)
Eh, FMK
Big One

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Saturday (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots lyric video for "Saturday" from the album Scaled And Icy, available now on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com

LYRICS
Slow down on Monday.
Not a sound on Wednesday.
Might get loud on Friday.
But on Saturday, Saturday, Saturday,
We paint the town.

Lose my sense a time or two
Weeks feel like days
Medicate in the afternoon.
And I just want to know
Have you lost your footing too?
I just pray that I'm not losing you.

Catch me floating circles in my fish bowl
Keep things fresh.
She said that I should change my clothes.
I exaggerate the life we used to know

snippet.title: The NBA Arrives In Fortnite
snippet.description:
Lace up... The Crossover is going to knock you off your feet. https://fn.gg/NBA

For the first time ever, the NBA is joining Fortnite! Coinciding with the debut of the State Farm NBA Play-In Tournament, Fortnite x NBA: The Crossover brings basketballŌĆÖs best into the Item Shop and Fortnite Creative, and with Team Battles, a unique experience featuring all 30 NBA teams in Fortnite.

Debuting on May 21 at 8pm ET, players can suit up and rep any of the league's 30 teams. The In The Paint Set includes 31 uniforms, including all 30 NBA teams. 

Also available, grab the Shoot & Score Pack to get the Hookshot Emote and Mini Hoop Back Bling, which can feature the logo of all 30 NBA teams. When other players have the Mini Hoop Back Bling equipped, youŌĆÖll be able to call your shot! 

If youŌĆÖre more of a point guard, show off your handles with the Dribblin' traversal Emote.

#FortniteNBA #TheCrossover #FortniteNBATheCrossover

snippet.title: Dentro de un edificio... que FLOTA??!
snippet.description:
Hoy me he colado en el CaixaForum de Madrid para mostraros una de las estructuras m├Īs curiosas de la ciudad: es un edificio... que flota! sisi, flota. O sea puedes caminar por debajo del edificio. En este v├Łdeo analizamos su funcionamiento y entendemos qu├® llev├│ a los arquitectos Herzog & de Meuron a dise├▒ar un edificio as├Ł.

Adem├Īs visitamos la exposici├│n de Jean Prouv├®, uno de los mejores ingenieros y dise├▒adores de mobiliario del siglo XX, y os ense├▒o uno de mis muebles favoritos ever que hizo.

V├Łdeo en colaboraci├│n con el CaixaForum de Madrid.

About Elite:
Three working-class boys attend one of the most exclusive schools in Spain, where the clash with the kids of the elite ends in tragedy.

About Netflix:
Netflix is the world's leading Internet entertainment service. Present in more than 190 countries, its more than 117 million subscribers enjoy more than 140 million hours of shows and movies every day, including Netflix original series, movies and documentaries. Netflix subscribers can watch the shows and movies they want, when they want, where they want, and on almost any screen connected to the Internet. They can also play, pause or continue to enjoy, and everything without ads or commitments to stay.

snippet.description:

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dannapaola 
TW: https://twitter.com/dannapaola
FB: https://www.facebook.com/DannaPaola/ 
Ō¢║Letra:
T├║ eres como yo:
Hieres a quien quieres paŌĆÖ tener lo que no tienes 

Yo soy como t├║: 
Lo que me entretiene casi nunca me conviene 

Yo te vi y tuve que romper la ley
Yo tambi├®n y lo volver├Ła a hacer 

(Coro)
Como ladrones, nos robamos besos que no nos pertenecen.
Como ladrones, le hacemos da├▒o a quien no merece.
Ladr├│n que roba a ladr├│n, tiene mil a├▒os de perd├│n.
Pero el que roba a un ladr├│n, siempre termina sin coraz├│n. 

┬┐Por qu├® lo prohibido es tan divertido? 
Si t├║ no eres m├Ło, ┬┐por qu├® quiero contigo?

Te tom├® prestada, en la madrugada
Nadie sabe nada, si no dices nada.

Y otra vez, otra vez 
Te robo la mirada paŌĆÖ que me vuelvas a ver
Y otra vez y otra vez
Me apuntas a la puerta pero ya yo s├® volver.

Quiero quemar tus besos como en una fogata.  
Quiero ser polic├Ła para ser quien te atrapa.

(Coro)
Como ladrones, nos robamos besos que no nos pertenecen.
Como ladrones, le hacemos da├▒o a quien no merece.
Ladr├│n que roba a ladr├│n, tiene mil a├▒os de perd├│n.
Pero el que roba a un ladr├│n, siempre termina sin coraz├│n. 

As├Ł nos pas├│ 
Eo eo eo 

Yo te vi, y tuve que romper la ley
Yo tambi├®n y lo volver├Ła a hacer.

(Coro)
Como ladrones, nos robamos besos que no nos pertenecen.
Como ladrones, le hacemos da├▒o a quien no merece.
Ladr├│n que roba a ladr├│n, tiene mil a├▒os de perd├│n.
Pero el que roba a un ladr├│n, siempre termina sin coraz├│n.

snippet.description:
Alexis y Fido, Yandel ŌĆō ŌĆśTe RetoŌĆÖ (Official Video)

Stream ŌĆśTe RetoŌĆÖ on your favorite streaming platform: https://AlexisFido.lnk.to/TeReto!PR

Connect with Alexis y Fido on socials:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/alexisyfido/ 
Twitter: https://twitter.com/alexisyfido 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/alexisyfido/ 

LYRICS 

Fido: Simple, de aqu├Ł t├║ no te vas, deja que el DJ ponga otra m├Īs.
Yandel: No pierdas el tiempo, quiero que te corras el riesgo,
Fido:Lista paŌĆÖ que perrees contra el ceto

Yandel: Uno, dos, tres, quieto...
Fido: Te reto, a que muevas el esqueleto, veo que tienes un booty perfecto, si te ofrezco un cantito, me pego un poquito y me dices "dame el paquete completo".

Yandel: A que muevas el esqueleto, sientes que en lo oscuro me acerco, cuando digo pare toŌĆÖ el mundo de acuerdo uno, dos, tres, quieto... te reto.

Alexis: Yoo, para esas nalgas paŌĆÖ arriba como si esto fuera un atraco, olv├Łdese del glamour qu├Łtese los tacos, dale pal medio de la pista y m├®tele bellaco que te voy a ense├▒ar en lo que me destaco, yo soy el m├Īs que le mete, el m├Īs que promete ven que yo te reto, te voya dar fuete como jinete ya s├® tu secreto y esta noche decreto que aqui toŌĆÖ el mundo baile hasta que yo les diga quieto, (nobody move) sacude el salitre que la disco est├Ī llena de buitres no dejes que nadie te registre s├Łgueme los pasos uno, dos, uno, dos y tres en lo oscuro paŌĆÖ que naŌĆÖ se filtre, date media vuelta y p├│nteme de espalda que te voy a subir la mini falda y azotarte esas nalgas, p├®gate a mi como si en la cintura tuviera un magneto uno, dos, tres, quieto... (yo no me quito)

Yandel: Te reto, a que muevas el esqueleto, veo que tienes un booty perfecto, si te ofrezco un cantito, me pego un poquito y me dices "dame el paquete completo"

Fido: A que muevas el esqueleto, sientes que en lo oscuro me acerco, cuando digo pare toŌĆÖ el mundo de acuerdo uno, dos, tres, quieto... te reto

Yandel: Zumba Yandel, t├║ est├Īs m├Īs rica en tacos pero te ves m├Īs chula en las retro, fina pero con el coraz├│n del ghetto, baby si quiero perrearte dime d├│nde es que te aprieto, paŌĆÖ faltarte el respeto con muchorespeto, perreame y guayame que el nene se me levante t├║ sabes mami, conmigo qu├®date, tamos s├Ībado y llegas martes t├║ sabes mami, paŌĆÖ que ponga ese booty a moverse como si estuviera celebrando, (clap, clap, clap) t├║ y yo nos hemos escapado un par de vecesdime que esta noche est├Īs planeando.

Alexis:(Habl├│ Yandel baby sigue los pasos)

Fido: A que muevas el esqueleto, veo que tienes un booty perfecto, si te ofrezco un cantito, me pego un poquito y me dices "dame el (paquete completo)

Yandel: A que muevas el esqueleto, sientes que en lo oscuro me acerco, cuando digo pare toŌĆÖ el mundo de acuerdo uno, dos, tres, quieto... te reto.

Alexis: Barrio Ca, Barrio Ca, Barrio Canino,
Yandel: Alexis y Fido el capitan Yandel, Y Entertainment, (si ellas piden perreo vamos all├Ī)

Alexis: Impulse, Nesty La Mente Maestra, Gios, Sierra, Barrio Ca, Barrio Ca, (Barrio Canino, Barrio Ca, Barrio Ca, Barrio Canino) entre ustedes y nosotros hay mucha diferencia, rrrrauufff ruuff

#AlexisyFido #TeReto #Yandel

snippet.title: Machu Picchu, el lugar m├Īs espectacular de Sudam├®rica
snippet.description:
Escondido entre dos monta├▒as en los Andes peruanos, Machu Picchu es un s├Łmbolo de la grandeza de la civilizaci├│n incaica. Los sistemas de cultivos, los caminos y la incre├Łble arquitectura de los incas se ve reflejada en este lugar. 

El lugar fue redescubierto reci├®n en 1911 por un investigador estadounidense, aunque se cree que la gente del lugar ya lo conoc├Ła. Igualmente, reci├®n ah├Ł tom├│ la fama mundial que merece, m├Īs de tres siglos despu├®s de haber sido abandonado. 

Machu Picchu es una de las grandes atracciones tur├Łsticas de Sudam├®rica. Antes de la pandemia, un mill├│n y medio de personas visitaban las ruinas cada a├▒o. Los amantes del trekking y la naturaleza podr├Īn recorrer tambi├®n los distintos caminos trazados en la ├®poca incaica.

O local s├│ foi redescoberto em 1911 por um pesquisador americano, embora se acredite que os locais j├Ī o conhecessem. Da mesma forma, foi s├│ l├Ī que conquistou a fama mundial que merece, mais de tr├¬s s├®culos depois de ter sido abandonado.

Machu Picchu ├® uma das grandes atra├¦├Ąes tur├Łsticas da Am├®rica do Sul. Antes da pandemia, um milh├Żo e meio de pessoas visitavam as ru├Łnas todos os anos. Os amantes do trekking e da natureza tamb├®m poder├Żo percorrer os diversos caminhos tra├¦ados na ├®poca dos incas.

en.title: Machu Picchu, the most spectacular place in South America
en.description:
Hidden between two mountains in the Peruvian Andes, Machu Picchu is a symbol of the greatness of the Inca civilization. The farming systems, the roads and the incredible architecture of the Incas are reflected in this place.

The place was only rediscovered in 1911 by an American researcher, although it is believed that the locals already knew it. Likewise, it was only there that it took on the world fame it deserves, more than three centuries after being abandoned.

Machu Picchu is one of the great tourist attractions in South America. Before the pandemic, one and a half million people visited the ruins every year. Lovers of trekking and nature will also be able to travel the different paths traced in Inca times.


­¤īÄ Un Mundo Inmenso
Singularities of our planet
